title: triticum tournefortii
intro: Triticum tournefortii, also known as Persian dill or tournefort's wheat, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the wheat family. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Triticum tournefortii include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is also used in some parts of the world as a spice or ingredient in traditional dishes.
